name: Yamashita Kenzo
description:
🗻 CEO OF UNDER MOUNT INC. 🗻

Kengan Ashura

▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃

↳ Kenzo has a decidedly androgynous appearance with a long hairless face, long black hair that falls past his neck and is styled with a middle parting, cold dead-looking eyes, a thin nose, full lips and finally a pair of rectangular semi-rimless glasses; his overall facial expression conveys a cold calculating feeling.

↳ He's the eldest son and the shadow boss of Under Mount Inc. in Kengan Annihilation Tournament.

▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃▃

Kenzo's personally my favorite besides a few others like Seki, i think he looks cute too ( ́▽`ʃ♡ƪ) - K.
creator: Kitae
